zh.lifeSummary: 當Watkin Vaughn I於大約1445年出生在英國賀福爾賀格斯特時，他的父親Sir Thomas Vaughan46歲，母親Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan44歲。他和Sibyl Baskerville至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1504年1月6日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Watkin Vaughn I于大约1445年出生在英国賀福爾賀格斯特时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Vaughan46岁，母亲Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan44岁。他和Sibyl Baskerville至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1504年1月6日在英国英格兰史洛普爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vaughn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Watkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a revival of the medieval given name, a pet form of Walter (from Wat + the diminutive suffix -kin), or a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Watkin Vaughn I was born about 1445, in Hergest, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Vaughan, was 46 and his mother, Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan, was 44. He had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Sibyl Baskerville. He died on 6 January 1504, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Watkin Vaughn I est né environ 1445, à Hergest, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Vaughan, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan, avait 44 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Sibyl Baskerville. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1504, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Watkin Vaughn I um 1445 in Hergest, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Vaughan 46 und seine Mutter Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan 44. Er hatte mit Sibyl Baskerville mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Januar 1504 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Watkin Vaughn I è nato il circa 1445 nel Hergest, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Vaughan, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan, aveva 44 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Sibyl Baskerville. Morì il 6 gennaio 1504, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Watkin Vaughn Iが約1445年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハージェストで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Vaughanは46歳，母Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughanは44歳であった。彼はSibyl Baskervilleとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1504年1月6日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Watkin Vaughn I(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 허퍼드실르 허그스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Vaughan(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan(은)는 44세였다. 그는 Sibyl Baskerville(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1504년 1월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Watkin Vaughn I nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Hergest, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Vaughan, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan, tinha 44 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Sibyl Baskerville. Ele faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1504, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Watkin Vaughn I родился около 1445 г. в местности хиржест, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Vaughan было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan, 44. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Sibyl Baskerville. Он умер 6 января 1504 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Watkin Vaughn I nació aproximadamente 1445, en Hergest, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Vaughan, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan, tenía 44 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Sibyl Baskerville. Murió el 6 de enero de 1504, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
